---
title: "Cubit phone convo 1"
format: revealjs
---



<video
  data-autoplay
  src="media/cubit_facetime_live_lecture_01.mp4"
  width="100%"
  height="100%"
></video>



::: notes
C: .... you look awful
AF: Well, it's been a long term etc.
:::

##

<video
  data-autoplay
  src="media/cubit_facetime_live_lecture_02.mp4"
  width="100%"
  height="100%" 
></video>

::: notes

C: Is it true that you are the greatest statistician in the land?
AF: Well, on a good day I'm barely adequate. But I am cheap, and I am available.
:::

##

<video
  data-autoplay
  src="media/cubit_facetime_live_lecture_03.mp4"
  width="100%"
  height="100%" 
></video>


::: notes

C: .... can you do it?
AF: yes, sure, leave it with me ... byE!
:::

##


<video
  data-autoplay
  src="media/cubit_facetime_live_lecture_04.mp4"
  width="100%"
  height="100%" 
></video>

::: notes
C: Thank you
:::
